claim: Plan mode is critical to prevent AI from going in wrong directions quickly during coding
actionable: Always start projects with plan mode to validate approach before code generation

claim: Voice prompts produce better results than typed prompts due to longer length and more context
actionable: Use voice input for AI prompts when possible to provide more detailed context

claim: MCP servers act as USB ports for AI to connect to external APIs and real-world data
actionable: Set up MCP servers to give agents access to live data sources and documentation

claim: Compound engineering means codebase and AI context improve with each iteration
actionable: Invest in Claude.md and cursor rules to enable compound improvements across project iterations
